items.name_en: 💰Sade hobo_Shoulder/Crossbody Bag
items.name_cn:
💰Sade hobo_Shoulder/Crossbody Bag
Imported Italian lambskin material, super soft and smooth. This versatile handbag features a folded top handle and a detachable shoulder strap for multiple carrying options. Comes with a fine long chain. A small bag that fits a phone perfectly, can be carried by hand or crossbody. So exquisite!

items.name_en: ICARE Original_
items.name_cn:
ICARE Original_
With the rise of the "small bag" trend, major brands have been making their bags smaller. While fashionistas use them for looks, they often need a larger tote to carry essentials like phones, water bottles, and umbrellas. Hearing this need, Y launched a new bag this season called ICARE, named after the Greek myth character Icarus. The 3D letter combination in the center of the Nappa leather is avant-garde and commanding. The brand's creative director also stated this handbag will be the most eye-catching new arrival. For those who can't rely on a small bag for daily outings, Icare's spacious capacity and clean design are perfect for you!
Model: 698651
Large Bag Dimensions: Opening Width 58cm
 Bottom Width 47cm
 Height (with handle) 61cm
 Bottom Side Width 8cm
Small Bag Dimensions: 27x13x8cm

items.name_en: YSL Monogram Caviar Envelope Bag. A super practical mini bag, the most classic style, upgraded to the highest version. 100% Italian calfskin with exquisite craftsmanship; custom metal YSL logo shows personality; flip-top design ensures security; small bag with large capacity, featuring 20 card slots, two bill compartments, two central compartments, and one zippered interior pocket. Model: S377828. Dimensions: 22x14x4cm

items.name_en: New YSL|Shopping Bag|||Saint Laurent's classic Shopping Bag is here [Like]
